# devices

**Instance Property**

All devices found by the browser. 

## Declaration

```swift
var devices: [ICDevice]? { get }
```

## Discussion

This array is empty before the first invocation of the delegate method [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/imagecapturecore/icdevicebrowserdelegate/1507732-devicebrowser]. The value of this property changes as devices appear and disappear.

## Browsing Devices

- **isBrowsing**: A Boolean value indicating whether the device browser is browsing for devices.
- **ICDevice**: An abstract object that represents a device.
- **browsedDeviceTypeMask**: A mask whose set bits indicate the type of devices being browsed after the delegate receives the start message.
- **start()**: Tells the delegate to start looking for devices.
- **stop()**: Tells the delegate to stop looking for devices.
